trending_videos.title: Montreal Canadiens at Tampa Bay Lightning
trending_videos.description: The Lightning host the Canadiens for a decisive Game 7 of the Eastern Conference First Round. Both teams recorded 106 points in the regular season. Tampa Bay forced this Game 7 with an overtime victory to avoid elimination in Game 6.

trending_videos.title: Wurth 400
trending_videos.description: The Cup Series visits the 1.5-mile Texas oval. Denny Hamlin looks to secure his third victory of the season. Following a top-5 finish at Talladega, Alex Bowman seeks to navigate the high banks of turns 1 and 2 to reach the winner's circle.

trending_videos.title: Texas Rangers at Detroit Tigers
trending_videos.description: The Detroit Tigers host the Texas Rangers to conclude a three-game series at Comerica Park. Josh Jung leads Texas with a .317 batting average against Detroit's Kevin McGonigle with an average of .333. Jack Leiter is the projected starter for Texas.

trending_videos.title: Top Gun: Maverick
trending_videos.description: Pete "Maverick" Mitchell keeps pushing the envelope after years of service as one of the Navy's top aviators. He must soon confront the past while training a new squad of graduates for a dangerous mission that demands the ultimate sacrifice.

trending_videos.title: Sunday Night in America With Trey Gowdy
trending_videos.description: Insightful analysis and a new outlook on the issues facing the country; Trey Gowdy, the former South Carolina Congressman, breaks down the legal and political news.

trending_videos.title: Minnesota Wild at Colorado Avalanche
trending_videos.description: The Avalanche and Wild open their Western Conference second-round series. The Presidents' Trophy-winning Avalanche enter after a first-round sweep, while the Wild advanced in six. Nathan MacKinnon had seven points versus the Wild this year.

trending_videos.title: Tell All: Part 2
trending_videos.description: Tensions erupt at the Tell All finale when explosive accusations come to light; Daniel confronts Lisa about cheating, Molly questions Sheena's future, Trish reveals the father of her baby, and Emma calls out Elise for crossing a line.

trending_videos.title: Unfinished Business
trending_videos.description: After completing the top floor of a local architect's downtown loft, Ben and Erin return to update the second floor after a fire; Erin steps outside her comfort zone to design a modern kitchen, entertainment room, and guest suite.
